reviews.comment:
Destaco y agradezco la EXCELENTE atención del lubriexperto (por desgarcia no recuerdo el nombre, oriundo de la Córdoba) : Da gusto ser atendido por gente así ante el inconveniente de fuidos en mi vehículo, estando yo de viaje. Por favor hacerle llegar mi agradecimiento.

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight and express my gratitude for the EXCELLENT service from the lubrication expert (unfortunately, I don't remember his name; he's from Córdoba): It's a pleasure to be helped by people like him when I had a fluid problem with my vehicle while traveling. Please pass on my thanks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1c19IblJnEAE
